hero.title: The Real Coffee Experts
hero.subtitle: Premium single-origin green coffee — sourced, roasted, and blended with Lebanese soul.

intro.title: Sourcing the world's finest green coffee
intro.body: We specialize in sourcing and supplying premium green coffee to the Middle East and Europe, in collaboration with Maison P. Jobin & Cie SAS (France) and Aziende Riunite Caffè S.R.L (Italy). Thanks to our extensive roasting and blending expertise, we produce the finest Italian espresso, American, Turkish and mocha coffee — and we bundle small orders from multiple origins into one container, shipped from multiple sources.
intro.cuppa: We also craft our own brand, CUPPA JOY — from the natural world and the high mountains of Ethiopia and Brazil, blended for the authentic Lebanese taste.

green.title: Green Coffee Trade
green.body: Premium single-origin raw beans for roasteries across the Middle East and Europe.

roast.title: Roasting & Blending
roast.body: Small-batch roasting at our own plant — Italian espresso, Turkish, American and mocha.

cross.title: Cross-Shipment Consolidation
cross.body: Small multi-origin orders bundled into one container, shipped from Europe.

cuppaTeaser.title: CUPPA JOY
cuppaTeaser.body: Premium roasted coffee from the highlands of Ethiopia and Brazil — prepared from the finest beans with a touch of the Magic of Lebanon.

closing.title: Enjoy the taste of CUPPA JOY!
closing.body: Talk to us about green coffee, custom blends, or your next consolidated shipment.
